rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §52.041 governs juvenile court referrals after school expulsion. The two provisions share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 52.041. REFERRAL OF CHILD TO JUVENILE COURT AFTER EXPULSION.
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax exemption change and this juvenile justice procedural statute.
